name: services-conversational-lead-in
description: Regression for extractServices fast-path. A casual reply with a 'yeah they're' opener and an 'and X' tail used to bypass the LLM via the regex fast-path and store ['yeah theyre <first>', ..., 'and <last>'] verbatim. The fast-path now rejects conversational openers and connector-prefixed tail tokens, falling through to the LLM which normalizes the list. Originally surfaced in the salon onboarding flow ('yeah theyre waxing, facials, nails, and haircuts'); the parser is industry-agnostic, so this fixture seeds a plumbing user — that path echoes the captured services back in the ack, letting reply_not_contains catch any literal leak of the dirty fragments.

turns.user: yeah theyre drain cleaning, pipe repair, and water heater installation
